Spells-Sorcerer — Female Human Sorcerer: 10
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 19 (+4) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Sage Alignment: Chaotic Evil
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 1; Intelligence: 2; Strength: 1 Experience: 83291/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes:
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Metamagic): 3; Sorcerer (Sorcerer Subclass): 1
Feats: Boon Of Truesight; Magic Initiate (Druid) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Sorcerer Features: Distant Spell; Draconic Resilience; Draconic Sorcery; Draconic Spells; Elemental Affinity; Font Of Magic; Heightened Spell; Innate Sorcery; Metamagic; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Seeking Spell; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerer Subclass; Sorcerous Restoration; Sorcery Incarnate; Spellcasting; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Sage Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Skill Proficiency (Arcana; History); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Metamagic: 3 selections
Sorcerer Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; History; Insight; Medicine; Stealth
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +8 Investigation: (int) +4 Religion: (int) +4
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +6 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +4 Stealth: (dex) +5
History: (int) +8 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Combat
Hit Points: 53 Initiative: +1 Armor Class: 14 Attacks Per Round: 1
Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+7 1d4+3 P R20/60); Shortbow (+5 1d6+1 P R80/320); Sickle (+7 1d4+3 S); Unarmed (+7 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Draconic Resilience: +10 Hit Points/+3 Armor Class in no armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +4; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes: Elemental Affinity: Has resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison
Magic
Spell Slots: S0: 6; S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 2 Attack: D: 6; S: 7; W: 8 Spell DC: D: 14; S: 15; W: 16
Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 2d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Alter Self (S2 Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains magic natural weapons with +8 attack and 1d6+4 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Alter Self (S2 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains magic natural weapons with +8 attack and 1d6+4 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Animate Objects (S5 Tran): R120' 3 Medium (10 hit points; Armor Class 15; +3 attack inflicts 1d4+3 force), 1 Large (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +3 attack inflicts 2d6+6 HP), or 1 Huge (40 hit points, Armor Class 15; +3 attack inflicts 2d12+6 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min [+Level animates +2 objects]
Arcane Eye (S4 [Draconic Spells] Divi): R30' Self sees with darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Hand (S5 Evoc): R120' Large force hand (Armor Class 20, 53 hit points, Strength 26, Dexterity 10) can move 60' per rd and can punch (inflicts 5d8 HP force), push 5' (save Strength negates), grapple (may crush, inflicting 2d6+3 HP bludgeoning), provide half cover, and inflict difficult terrain for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +2d8 HP force and +4d6 HP bludgeoning]
Banishment (S4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blight (S4 Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target automatically fails) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blindness/Deafness (S2 Tran): R120' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution ends) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blink (S3 Tran): Self has a 50% chance of becoming ethereal at the end each turn, returning to a spot within 10' at the start of the next turn, for 1 min
Blur (S2 Illu): Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Burning Hands (S1 Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Chain Lightning (S6 Evoc): R150' Inflicts 10d8 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) on 4 targets in a 30' radius [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Monster (S4 Ench): R30' Target regards self as a friend (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Monster (S4 [Draconic Spells] Ench): R30' Target regards self as a friend (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Person (S1 Ench): R30' Target regards self as a friend (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Chill Touch (S0 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points for 1 rd; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Chromatic Orb (S1 Evoc): R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage die indicates that the spell leaps to another target within 30' of the first [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 times]
Chromatic Orb (S1 [Draconic Spells] Evoc): R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage die indicates that the spell leaps to another target within 30' of the first [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 times]
Circle Of Death (S6 Necr): R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +2d8 HP]
Clairvoyance (S3 Divi): R1 mile Self can see or hear through an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Cloudkill (S5 Conj): R120' 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half) and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Color Spray (S1 Illu): 15' cone blinds (save Constitution negates) until the start of the next turn
Command (S1 [Draconic Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Comprehend Languages (S1 Divi): Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Confusion (S4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Counterspell (S3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Creation (S5 Illu): R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting up to 24 hr [+Level creates a +5' cube]
Dancing Lights (S0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min
Darkness (S2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkvision (S2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (S3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Delayed Blast Fireball (S7 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) within concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Demiplane (S8 Conj): R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Detect Magic (S1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Detect Thoughts (S2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Dimension Door (S4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (S1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force [+Level inflicts +3d6 HP]
Dispel Magic (S3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Dominate Monster (S8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Person (S5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Dragon's Breath (S2 Tran): Touch can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Dragon's Breath (S2 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Touch can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Earthquake (S8 Tran): R500' 100' radius opens fissures, damages structures, breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates), and knocks prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Elementalism (S0 Tran): TODO
Enhance Ability (S2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enlarge/Reduce (S2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage (save Constitution negates), for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Etherealness (S7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Expeditious Retreat (S1 Tran): Self gains a bonus Dash once per rd for concentration up to 10 min
Eyebite (S6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (disadvantage on attack and ability rolls) (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
False Life (S1 Necr): Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Fear (S3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone flee (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (S3 [Draconic Spells] Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone flee (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Finger Of Death (S7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Fire Bolt (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Shield (S4 Evoc): Self gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold damage, and a successful adjacent attacker suffers 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (S7 Evoc): R150' 10 connected 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (S3 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Blade (S2 Evoc): Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6 HP fire and lights a 10' radius for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flaming Sphere (S2 Conj): R60' 5' sphere lights a 20' radius, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half), ignites unattended flammable objects, and can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flesh To Stone (S6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Fly (S3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fly (S3 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fog Cloud (S1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Freezing Sphere (S6 Evoc): R300' 60' radius inflicts 10d6 HP cold (save Constitution half) and freezes water for 1 min; effects can be placed into a globe that can be thrown 40' within 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Gaseous Form (S3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (S9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Globe Of Invulnerability (S6 Abju): 10' radius blocks spells up to level 5 for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1]
Grease (S1 Conj): R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Gust Of Wind (S2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min
Haste (S3 Tran): R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity, and an additional action for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Hold Monster (S5 Ench): R90' Paralyzes the target creature (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (S2 Ench): R60' Paralyzes the target humanoid (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hypnotic Pattern (S3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage ends the effects
Ice Knife (S1 Conj): R60' Ranged spell attack inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold]
Ice Storm (S4 Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]
Incendiary Cloud (S8 Conj): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), obscures, and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Insect Plague (S5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Invisibility (S2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Jump (S1 Tran): Touched gains 30' jump after a 10' move for 1 min
Knock (S2 Tran): R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Legend Lore (S5 [Draconic Spells] Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Levitate (S2 Tran): R60' Target floats (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Light (S0 Evoc): Touched unattended object lights a 20' radius for 1 hr
Lightning Bolt (S3 Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (S0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Missile (S1 Evoc): R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each [+Level creates +1 dart]
Magic Weapon (S2 Tran): Gives touched weapon a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Major Image (S3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Mass Suggestion (S6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Mending (S0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1'
Message (S0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd
Meteor Swarm (S9 Evoc): R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Mind Spike (S2 Divi): R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Minor Illusion (S0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Mirror Image (S2 Illu): 3 duplicates (Armor Class 11; damage destroys) allow misdirecting attacks on self for 1 min with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate
Misty Step (S2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Move Earth (S6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Phantasmal Force (S2 Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Plane Shift (S7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Poison Spray (S0 Necr): R30' Inflicts 2d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Polymorph (S4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 HP
Power Word Kill (S9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Stun (S8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): R10' Creates minor magic effects for 1 hr
Prismatic Spray (S7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates); 2 of the preceding effects
Protection From Energy (S3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage for concentration up to 1 hr
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Reverse Gravity (S7 Tran): R100' Items in a 50' radius fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks inflict 2d6 HP fire each [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
See Invisibility (S2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Seeming (S5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Shatter (S2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Shield (S1 Abju): Reaction gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shocking Grasp (S0 Evoc): Touched suffers 2d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until its next turn
Silent Image (S1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Sleep (S1 Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking wakens)
Sleet Storm (S3 Conj): R150' 40' radius douses flames and inflicts difficult terrain and falling prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (S3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per rd, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Sorcerous Burst (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, psychic, or thunder; rolled 8s on the damage allow adding up to +3d8 damage
Spider Climb (S2 Tran): Willing touched can crawl on walls and ceilings for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Stinking Cloud (S3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stoneskin (S4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for concentration up to 1 hr
Suggestion (S2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr
Summon Dragon (S5 [Draconic Spells] Conj): R60' Summons an obedient draconic spirit for concentration up to 1 hr; it has Armor Class 19, 50 hit points, 30' Speed, 60' fly Speed, 30' swim Speed, 2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6 + 19 HP piercing, and a breath weapon that inflicts 2d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison in a 30' cone [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, and piercing damage by 1]
Sunbeam (S6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (S8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP and blindness (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness) for 1 min
Telekinesis (S5 Tran): R60' Self can mentally move a Huge or smaller object 30' per rd (save Strength negates) for concentration up to 10 min
Teleport (S7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended object or self and 8 allies any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (S5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Thunderwave (S1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Time Stop (S9 Tran): Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Tongues (S3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
True Seeing (S6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (S0 Divi): +7 attack with held weapon inflicts +1d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Vampiric Touch (S3 Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP, and self regains half as many, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Vitriolic Sphere (S4 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid next rd (save Dexterity half initial HP only) [+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial]
Wall Of Fire (S4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Stone (S5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels, with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Water Breathing (S3 Tran): R30' 10 targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (S3 Tran): R30' 10 targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Web (S2 Conj): R60' 20' cube restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates and Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Wish (S9 Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or otherwise alters reality with few limits
Magic Notes:
Distant Spell: Can spend 1 Sorcery Point to double the range of a spell or to give a touch spell a 30' range
Elemental Affinity: Spells that deal a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison inflict +3 HP
Font Of Magic: Can use 10 Sorcery Points per long rest, convert spell slots to Sorcery Points, and use a bonus action to convert Sorcery Points to a spell slot
Heightened Spell: Can spend 2 Sorcery Points to inflict disadvantage on a target's saves vs. a self spell
Innate Sorcery: Can use a bonus action to gain +1 spell DC and advantage on spell attacks for 1 min 2 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Seeking Spell: Can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll a failed spell attack
Sorcerous Restoration: Taking a short rest restores 5 Sorcery Points once per long rest
Sorcery Incarnate: Can spend 2 Sorcery Points for additional uses of Innate Sorcery, and can use 2 Metamagic options on each spell
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
